summary: Iteration 91 - Quick Book feature testing completed. Fixed critical bug: ProfileResponse was missing on_demand_active field. All Quick Book UI features verified working correctly.

critical.issue: Frontend sends different request format than backend expects. Frontend sends {surfer_id, photographer_id, duration_hours} in body, but backend expects requester_id as query param and CreateDispatchRequest schema (latitude, longitude, estimated_duration_hours, is_immediate)

integration_issues.issue: handleQuickBookSubmit sends wrong request format to /api/dispatch/request. Sends {surfer_id, photographer_id, duration_hours, payment_method, resolution_preference} but backend expects requester_id as query param and {latitude, longitude, estimated_duration_hours, is_immediate} in body

action_items: Fix Profile.js handleQuickBookSubmit to match backend dispatch API format: use requester_id query param and CreateDispatchRequest schema
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added on_demand_active and on_demand_hourly_rate fields to ProfileResponse schema in profiles.py
FIXED: Updated profile_to_response function to map on_demand_available to on_demand_active for frontend compatibility
Quick Book buttons conditional logic working correctly: Quick Book Now (yellow) only shows when on_demand_active=true
Book a Session (cyan gradient) shows when photographer is NOT on-demand active
Schedule Later (outline cyan) shows alongside Quick Book Now when photographer IS on-demand active
Green 'Available Now for On-Demand' status badge correctly shows/hides based on on_demand_active
Live Price Calculator updates in real-time with formula: $rate/hr × hours = $total
NumericStepper works correctly with 0.5-8 hour range and 0.5 step increments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Book UI features all working. Backend fix applied to return on_demand_active field in profile responses. Main issue remaining: handleQuickBookSubmit in Profile.js sends wrong request format to dispatch API. The dispatch API expects requester_id as query param and CreateDispatchRequest schema in body.

on_demand_active_true.quick_book_now_button: VERIFIED - Yellow gradient, shows 'Quick Book Now'
on_demand_active_true.on_demand_status_badge: VERIFIED - Green badge 'Available Now for On-Demand'

on_demand_active_false.book_a_session_button: VERIFIED - Cyan gradient, shows 'Book a Session'

on_demand_modal.title: VERIFIED - 'Quick Book - On-Demand' with Zap icon
on_demand_modal.photographer_info: VERIFIED - Avatar, name, role, 'Available Now' status
on_demand_modal.price_calculator: VERIFIED - Shows total with formula breakdown
on_demand_modal.real_time_price_update: VERIFIED - Price updates when duration changes
on_demand_modal.whats_included: VERIFIED - Photos included, hours, immediate response

scheduled_modal.title: VERIFIED - 'Quick Book - Scheduled' with CalendarClock icon
scheduled_modal.price_calculator: VERIFIED - Shows total with formula breakdown
scheduled_modal.info_note: VERIFIED - Shows redirect to full booking page message
scheduled_modal.submit_button: VERIFIED - 'Continue to Booking' with cyan gradient
